title: ctenopteris assurgens
intro: Ctenopteris assurgens is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a species of fern. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris assurgens is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
